texts.KatKat:010001: A complex can only be created inside a tenant scope.
texts.KatKat:010002: A complex with the name '{name}' already exists.
texts.KatKat:010003: The new subscription end date must be later than the current one.
texts.KatKat:020001: A building named '{name}' already exists in this complex.
texts.KatKat:020002: Floor count must be a positive number.
texts.KatKat:030001: A flat numbered '{flatNumber}' already exists in this building.
texts.KatKat:030002: Share factor must be greater than zero.
texts.KatKat:040001: This user is already a member of the flat.
texts.KatKat:040002: Only unverified residents can be approved.
texts.KatKat:040003: An unverified resident cannot be promoted directly. Approve them first.
texts.KatKat:050001: This request is no longer open.
texts.KatKat:050002: You cannot fulfill your own request.
texts.KatKat:050003: Only an open request can be cancelled.
texts.KatKat:060001: Total amount must be greater than zero.
texts.KatKat:060002: This complex has no flats to distribute the expense to.
texts.KatKat:060003: This share has already been paid.
texts.KatKat:060004: Only a member of this flat can pay its share.
texts.KatKat:070001: Only an open issue can be moved to in-progress.
texts.KatKat:070002: Only an in-progress issue can be resolved.
texts.KatKat:080001: The end time must be after the start time.
texts.KatKat:080002: This resource is already reserved for part of the requested time range.
texts.KatKat:080003: Only a confirmed reservation can be cancelled.
texts.KatKat:080004: Only the person who made this reservation can cancel it.
texts.KatKat:090001: Only a help-needed alert can be resolved.
texts.Validation:NeededUntilMustBeFuture: The needed-until time must be in the future.
texts.Validation:ExtendSubscriptionDateMustBeF: The new subscription end date must be in the future.
texts.Validation:FloorCountMustBePositive: Floor count must be a positive number.
texts.Validation:ShareFactorMustBePositive: Share factor must be greater than zero.
texts.Validation:TotalAmountMustBePositive: Total amount must be greater than zero.
texts.Validation:EndTimeMustBeAfterStartTime: The end time must be after the start time.
